serverInfo.name: uzinaduzina-content
serverInfo.description: Read-only MCP server exposing the editorial content of uzinaduzina.org. Two tools: list_notes (full index) and fetch_note_markdown (markdown source by slug). No authentication required.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: Return the index of every published note on uzinaduzina.org with type, title, kicker, summary, and slug.

tools.name: fetch_note_markdown
tools.description: Fetch the original Markdown source for a single note by slug (e.g. 'project-democraicy', 'manifesto-living-heritage').
